languages.text: {n}Себериан поднимает голову, словно превозмогая тяжесть многочисленных имплантов, и вперивает в вас взгляд, пылающий праведным огнем.{/n} "Наша цель ясна. Найдем же врага и воздадим ему по грехам его, наследни{mf|к|ца}".

{n}Seberian lifts his head as if straining against the weight of his numerous implants, and fixes you with an eye burning with righteous fire.{/n} "Our purpose is clear. Let us find the enemy and repay them according to their misdeeds, heir."
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан поднимает голову, словно превозмогая тяжесть многочисленных имплантов, и вперивает в вас взгляд, пылающий праведным огнем.{/n} "Наша цель ясна. Найдем же врага и воздадим ему по грехам его, наследни{mf|к|ца}".

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian lifts his head as if straining against the weight of his numerous implants, and fixes you with a gaze burning with righteous fire.{/n} "Our purpose is clear. Let us find the enemy and repay them according to their deeds, heir."

{n}Seberian lifts his head as if straining against the weight of his numerous implants, and fixes you with a gaze burning with righteous fire.{/n} "Our purpose is clear. Let us find the enemy and repay them according to their deeds, heir."

{n}Seberian lifts his head as if straining against the weight of his numerous implants, and fixes you with an eye burning with righteous fire.{/n} "Our purpose is clear. Let us find the enemy and repay them according to their misdeeds, heir."

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安抬起头，仿佛在对抗身上那无数植入物的重压，用那只燃着义愤之火的眼紧盯着你。{/n}“我们的目标很明确。找到敌人，让他们为自己的恶行付出代价，继承人。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian lifts his head as if straining against the weight of his numerous implants, and fixes you with an eye burning with righteous fire.{/n} "Our purpose is clear. Let us find the enemy and repay them according to their misdeeds, heir."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安抬起头，仿佛在对抗身上那无数植入物的重压，用那只燃着义愤之火的眼紧盯着你。{/n}“我们的目标很明确。找到敌人，让他们为自己的恶行付出代价，继承人。”

languages.text: {n}Seberian levanta la cabeza con dificultad, como si le pesaran los implantes, y te mira con ojos que arden con furia justiciera.{/n} «Nuestro objetivo está claro. Encontremos al enemigo y hagamos que pague por sus crímenes, hereder{mf|o|a}».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian lifts his head as if straining against the weight of his numerous implants, and fixes you with an eye burning with righteous fire.{/n} "Our purpose is clear. Let us find the enemy and repay them according to their misdeeds, heir."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian levanta la cabeza con dificultad, como si le pesaran los implantes, y te mira con ojos que arden con furia justiciera.{/n} «Nuestro objetivo está claro. Encontremos al enemigo y hagamos que pague por sus crímenes, hereder{mf|o|a}».

languages.text: {n}Seberian relève la tête, semblant lutter contre le poids de ses nombreux implants, et vous fixe d'un regard empli d'un juste courroux.{/n} « Notre objectif est clair. Nous devons trouver l'ennemi et lui rendre la monnaie de sa pièce, {mf|mon héritier|mon héritière}. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian lifts his head as if straining against the weight of his numerous implants, and fixes you with an eye burning with righteous fire.{/n} "Our purpose is clear. Let us find the enemy and repay them according to their misdeeds, heir."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian relève la tête, semblant lutter contre le poids de ses nombreux implants, et vous fixe d'un regard empli d'un juste courroux.{/n} « Notre objectif est clair. Nous devons trouver l'ennemi et lui rendre la monnaie de sa pièce, {mf|mon héritier|mon héritière}. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian, sayısız implantının ağırlığına direniyormuş gibi başını kaldırıyor ve haklı bir ateşle yanan gözlerini sana dikiyor.{/n} "Amacımız açık. Düşmanı bulalım ve onlara kötülüklerinin bedelini ödetelim vârisim."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian lifts his head as if straining against the weight of his numerous implants, and fixes you with an eye burning with righteous fire.{/n} "Our purpose is clear. Let us find the enemy and repay them according to their misdeeds, heir."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian, sayısız implantının ağırlığına direniyormuş gibi başını kaldırıyor ve haklı bir ateşle yanan gözlerini sana dikiyor.{/n} "Amacımız açık. Düşmanı bulalım ve onlara kötülüklerinin bedelini ödetelim vârisim."

languages.text: {n}Seberian hebt seinen Kopf, als würde er sich gegen das Gewicht seiner zahlreichen Implantate stemmen, und fixiert dich mit seinem Auge, in dem ein rechtschaffenes Feuer lodert.{/n} "Unser Ziel ist klar. Lasst uns den Feind finden und für seine Verbrechen bezahlen, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian lifts his head as if straining against the weight of his numerous implants, and fixes you with an eye burning with righteous fire.{/n} "Our purpose is clear. Let us find the enemy and repay them according to their misdeeds, heir."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian hebt seinen Kopf, als würde er sich gegen das Gewicht seiner zahlreichen Implantate stemmen, und fixiert dich mit seinem Auge, in dem ein rechtschaffenes Feuer lodert.{/n} "Unser Ziel ist klar. Lasst uns den Feind finden und für seine Verbrechen bezahlen, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}."

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは、数々のインプラントの重さに耐えるかのように首を上げ、正義の炎を燃やす目で君を見つめた。{/n}「我々の目的は明らかだ。敵を見つけ、彼らの悪行に報いを与えよう、後継者。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian lifts his head as if straining against the weight of his numerous implants, and fixes you with an eye burning with righteous fire.{/n} "Our purpose is clear. Let us find the enemy and repay them according to their misdeeds, heir."

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンは、数々のインプラントの重さに耐えるかのように首を上げ、正義の炎を燃やす目で君を見つめた。{/n}「我々の目的は明らかだ。敵を見つけ、彼らの悪行に報いを与えよう、後継者。」
